requirement_topic.en: Honduras Grid-Connection Standards — CREE / ENEE / ODS Interconnection and 60 Hz / 120-240 V Settings
requirement_topic.zh: 洪都拉斯并网标准——CREE / ENEE / ODS并网及60 Hz / 120-240 V参数
requirement_topic.zht: 宏都拉斯併網標準——CREE / ENEE / ODS併網及60 Hz / 120-240 V參數

summary.en: Honduras PV inverter grid connection is reviewed through the Honduran electricity-sector framework: CREE publishes the laws, regulations, technical norms, and procedures for the sector; ENEE is the national utility and is linked to the system operator/ODS context; and project interconnection must satisfy the applicable distribution, transmission, or autoproductor route. For inverter evidence, project specifications commonly refer to IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility-interface characteristics, and local interconnection settings. The important electrical difference is that Honduras uses an Americas-style 60 Hz / 120-240 V supply environment, not the 50 Hz / 220-380 V China baseline. Firmware protection thresholds, anti-islanding trip windows, reconnection delays, voltage ranges, frequency windows, and phase configuration must be parameterised and tested for the Honduran point of connection.
summary.zh: 洪都拉斯光伏逆变器并网须在洪都拉斯电力部门框架下审查：CREE发布该部门的法律、法规、技术规范和程序；ENEE为国家电力公司，并与系统运营方/ODS背景相关；项目并网须满足适用的配电、输电或自发自用路径要求。逆变器证据方面，项目规格通常会引用IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727公用电网接口特性及本地并网整定。关键电气差异在于洪都拉斯采用美洲式60 Hz / 120-240 V供电环境，而不是中国50 Hz / 220-380 V基准。固件保护阈值、防孤岛跳闸窗口、重连延时、电压范围、频率窗口和相制配置必须针对洪都拉斯接入点进行参数化和测试。
summary.zht: 宏都拉斯光伏逆變器併網須在宏都拉斯電力部門框架下審查：CREE發布該部門的法律、法規、技術規範和程序；ENEE為國家電力公司，並與系統營運方/ODS背景相關；項目併網須滿足適用的配電、輸電或自發自用路徑要求。逆變器證據方面，項目規格通常會引用IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727公用電網介面特性及本地併網整定。關鍵電氣差異在於宏都拉斯採用美洲式60 Hz / 120-240 V供電環境，而不是中國50 Hz / 220-380 V基準。韌體保護閾值、防孤島跳脫窗口、重連延時、電壓範圍、頻率窗口和相制配置必須針對宏都拉斯接入點進行參數化和測試。

standards_or_laws: CREE — Leyes, Reglamentos, Normas Técnicas y Procedimientos for the Honduran electricity sector
CREE Norma Técnica de Usuarios Autoproductores — residential and commercial renewable self-generation framework
CREE Norma Técnica de Acceso, Conexión y Uso de la Red de Transmisión — access, connection, and use of transmission network
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
Honduras grid context — 60 Hz / 120-240 V service environment

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power stations connected to the power system, NB/T 32004 inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408 technical requirements for PV grid-connected inverters, and domestic anti-islanding test evidence. These documents are based on Chinese 50 Hz grid conditions and typical 220/380 V settings. They are useful for understanding model capability but do not automatically satisfy CREE, ENEE, ODS, or project-owner acceptance in Honduras.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定、NB/T 32004逆变器技术规范、GB/T 37408光伏并网逆变器技术要求及国内防孤岛测试证据。上述文件基于中国50 Hz电网条件及常见220/380 V参数。它们可用于理解型号能力，但不能自动满足洪都拉斯CREE、ENEE、ODS或项目业主的验收要求。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定、NB/T 32004逆變器技術規範、GB/T 37408光伏併網逆變器技術要求及國內防孤島測試證據。上述文件基於中國50 Hz電網條件及常見220/380 V參數。它們可用於理解型號能力，但不能自動滿足宏都拉斯CREE、ENEE、ODS或項目業主的驗收要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese 50 Hz / 220-380 V grid evidence does not prove Honduras 60 Hz / 120-240 V interconnection behaviour. Exporters should prepare a Honduras configuration record, IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence at 60 Hz where required, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence where specified, and project-specific protection settings for ENEE/ODS or distribution review. Do not ship units locked to China default grid codes without documented reconfiguration and retesting where the firmware or protection profile materially changes.
gap.zh: 差距：中国50 Hz / 220-380 V并网证据不能证明在洪都拉斯60 Hz / 120-240 V条件下的并网行为。出口商应准备洪都拉斯配置记录、在要求时提供60 Hz条件下的IEC 62116防孤岛证据、在项目指定时提供IEC 61727公用电网接口证据，并为ENEE/ODS或配电审查提供项目特定保护整定。不得在没有记录重新配置及必要复测的情况下交付锁定中国默认电网代码的设备。
gap.zht: 差距：中國50 Hz / 220-380 V併網證據不能證明在宏都拉斯60 Hz / 120-240 V條件下的併網行為。出口商應準備宏都拉斯配置記錄、在要求時提供60 Hz條件下的IEC 62116防孤島證據、在項目指定時提供IEC 61727公用電網介面證據，並為ENEE/ODS或配電審查提供項目特定保護整定。不得在沒有記錄重新配置及必要複測的情況下交付鎖定中國預設電網代碼的設備。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid-tied projects requiring CREE framework compliance and ENEE/ODS or distribution interconnection acceptance; exact test package depends on project size and point of connection
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China-side grid operator or certification expectations but is not transferable to Honduras without local settings review and project acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat CREE rules plus ENEE/ODS interconnection review as Honduras project gates. China GB/T and NB/T reports can support technical due diligence, but the inverter must be configured and, where required, retested for Honduras 60 Hz / 120-240 V operation before interconnection acceptance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将CREE规则及ENEE/ODS并网审查视为洪都拉斯项目门槛。中国GB/T和NB/T报告可支持技术尽调，但逆变器必须针对洪都拉斯60 Hz / 120-240 V运行进行配置，并在要求时复测后再用于并网验收。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將CREE規則及ENEE/ODS併網審查視為宏都拉斯項目門檻。中國GB/T和NB/T報告可支持技術盡調，但逆變器必須針對宏都拉斯60 Hz / 120-240 V運行進行配置，並在要求時複測後再用於併網驗收。

requirement_topic.en: Distributed Generation / Autoproductores — CREE Rules and ENEE Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 分布式发电/自发自用用户——CREE规则及ENEE项目验收
requirement_topic.zht: 分散式發電/自發自用用戶——CREE規則及ENEE項目驗收

summary.en: CREE's published legal and technical-norms page identifies the Norma Técnica de Usuarios Autoproductores as the framework for residential and commercial users that install renewable generation equipment to supply their own consumption and receive remuneration for injected surplus energy. For a Chinese inverter, this means the compliance package is not only a product test file: the installer or project sponsor must align the inverter model, protection settings, metering arrangement, injection limits, and commissioning evidence with the CREE autoproductor rule and the distributor/ENEE acceptance process. Honduras has significant solar penetration and SIEPAC regional interconnection context, so project engineers may apply additional stability, voltage, and frequency ride-through expectations for larger systems.
summary.zh: CREE公布的法律和技术规范页面将《自发自用用户技术规范》列为住宅和商业用户安装可再生能源发电设备以满足自身用电并就注入剩余电量获得补偿的框架。对于中国逆变器而言，合规包不只是产品测试文件：安装方或项目发起方须使逆变器型号、保护整定、计量安排、注入限制和调试证据与CREE自发自用用户规则及配电商/ENEE验收流程一致。洪都拉斯太阳能渗透率较高，并处于SIEPAC区域互联背景下，因此较大型系统的项目工程师可能会提出额外的稳定性、电压和频率穿越要求。
summary.zht: CREE公布的法律和技術規範頁面將《自發自用用戶技術規範》列為住宅和商業用戶安裝可再生能源發電設備以滿足自身用電並就注入剩餘電量獲得補償的框架。對於中國逆變器而言，合規包不只是產品測試文件：安裝方或項目發起方須使逆變器型號、保護整定、計量安排、注入限制和調試證據與CREE自發自用用戶規則及配電商/ENEE驗收流程一致。宏都拉斯太陽能滲透率較高，並處於SIEPAC區域互聯背景下，因此較大型系統的項目工程師可能會提出額外的穩定性、電壓和頻率穿越要求。

standards_or_laws: CREE Norma Técnica de Usuarios Autoproductores — residential and commercial renewable self-generation and surplus injection framework
CREE Reglamento de Servicio Eléctrico de Distribución — distribution service conditions
ENEE / distributor interconnection and commissioning acceptance for grid-tied installations
SIEPAC / Central American regional interconnection context for larger grid-impact projects

summary.en: China distributed PV connection approvals are handled under Chinese national and grid-company rules, with product evidence commonly based on GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, GB/T 19964-2024, and factory grid-code settings for China. Those approvals do not establish that the same inverter is eligible for Honduras autoproductor injection, netting, metering, or commissioning arrangements.
summary.zh: 中国分布式光伏并网审批依据中国国家和电网企业规则办理，产品证据通常基于GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004、GB/T 19964-2024以及中国工厂电网代码设置。上述审批不能证明同一逆变器适用于洪都拉斯自发自用用户的注入、抵扣、计量或调试安排。
summary.zht: 中國分散式光伏併網審批依據中國國家和電網企業規則辦理，產品證據通常基於GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004、GB/T 19964-2024以及中國工廠電網代碼設置。上述審批不能證明同一逆變器適用於宏都拉斯自發自用用戶的注入、抵扣、計量或調試安排。

standards_or_laws: NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)

gap.en: Gap: China domestic distributed-PV acceptance does not transfer to Honduras autoproductor or distributed-generation approval. Confirm the applicable CREE route, distributor/ENEE documents, metering requirements, commissioning tests, and whether the inverter's export-control and anti-islanding functions must be witnessed or retested at 60 Hz / 120-240 V. For commercial systems, confirm whether additional ODS, transmission-access, or regional-interconnection studies apply.
gap.zh: 差距：中国国内分布式光伏验收不能转移为洪都拉斯自发自用或分布式发电批准。须确认适用的CREE路径、配电商/ENEE文件、计量要求、调试测试，以及逆变器出口限制和防孤岛功能是否须在60 Hz / 120-240 V条件下见证或复测。对于商业系统，还应确认是否适用额外的ODS、输电接入或区域互联研究。
gap.zht: 差距：中國國內分散式光伏驗收不能轉移為宏都拉斯自發自用或分散式發電批准。須確認適用的CREE路徑、配電商/ENEE文件、計量要求、調試測試，以及逆變器出口限制和防孤島功能是否須在60 Hz / 120-240 V條件下見證或複測。對於商業系統，還應確認是否適用額外的ODS、輸電接入或區域互聯研究。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the installation connects to the Honduran distribution or transmission system under CREE autoproductor, distributed-generation, or access rules
mandatory_status.cn: China distributed-generation approvals and domestic grid-code settings are project-specific to China and not transferable to Honduras

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Honduras distributed PV project needs a project-level CREE and ENEE/distributor acceptance path, not only a China inverter certificate. Confirm the autoproductor or interconnection route before selecting firmware settings, export-control functions, metering hardware, and commissioning tests.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 洪都拉斯分布式光伏项目需要项目层面的CREE及ENEE/配电商验收路径，而不仅是中国逆变器证书。选择固件设置、出口限制功能、计量硬件和调试测试前，应先确认自发自用或并网路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 宏都拉斯分散式光伏項目需要項目層面的CREE及ENEE/配電商驗收路徑，而不僅是中國逆變器證書。選擇韌體設置、出口限制功能、計量硬體和調試測試前，應先確認自發自用或併網路徑。
